particulars.description: Unit 10, trinity business park, wakefield WF2 8EF as is more particularly described and identified in a transfer of even date between (1) martley capital reip series b propco limited and (2) a j senior limited ("the TP1") - title number: part of the land and buildings currently comprised within title numbers WYK649442 (registered as land and buildings on the north side of waldorf way, wakefield) and WYK920763 (registered as land adjoining trinity business park, turner way, wakefield) and to be allocated a new title number on registration of the TP1.

497-501 (odd) ecclesall road sheffield, f/h t/n SYK552614, 5 bruce road sheffield f/h t/n SYK552659, land at the back of 5 bruce road sheffield f/h t/n SYK484243. For details of further properties charged, please see form MG01 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.
